title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 227.779 - Police Officer Michael V Langsdorf Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge on I-55 in St. Louis County
text:
227.779.  Police Officer Michael V Langsdorf Memorial Bridge designated for a bridge on I-55 in St. Louis County. — The bridge on Interstate 55 crossing over Butler Hill Road in St. Louis County shall be designated as "Police Officer Michael V Langsdorf Memorial Bridge".  The department of transportation shall erect and maintain appropriate signs designating such bridge, with the costs to be paid by private donations.
(L. 2021 S.B. 520)
